title: The Understanding Heart
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Edward T. Lowe Jr., Joseph Farnham
actors: Joan Crawford, Rockliffe Fellowes, Francis X. Bushman Jr.
plot: Minca Dale is a fire lookout in love with Forest Ranger Tony Garland. Escaped killer Bob Mason hides out in Monica's observatory and falls in love with her. A fire encircles them and is put out by rain. Bob finally gives her up to...
